page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A dedicated database of non-B cell derived immunoglobulin variable region.

Non-B cell derived ImmunoGlobulin Variable region Database.

Welcome to NBIGV, a database dedicated to organizing and characterizing non-B cell derived immunoglobulins.
